channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by United Surveys for WP.pl, 20–21 February 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
27 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by United Surveys for WP.pl, 20–21 February 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/polish_ep_polls/2026-02-21-UnitedSurveys.html
